title: How to build a custom vision agent
summary: John Capobianco demonstrates a custom vision agent that uses Google Gemini and the Model Context Protocol to capture live photos via webcam and animate them with Veo 3. The agent processes natural language prompts and real-time ASL conversations with a generative media workflow.
writeup: John Capobianco builds a custom vision agent on Google Cloud Tech that pairs Google Gemini with the Model Context Protocol to capture live photos through a webcam and animate them using Veo 3. The agent accepts natural language prompts and handles real-time ASL conversations, routing them through a generative media workflow. The demonstration shows how MCP can connect a multimodal model to live camera input and video generation, covering agent design, real-time interaction, and the path from a captured image to an animated result.
